creator: bero@redhat.de
text:
The installer apparently hasn't been updated to know about the new ad* devices.
Trying to install 4.0-19991218 stops at filesystem generation:

Unable to make device node for /dev/ad1s1b in /dev
The creation of file systems will be aborted.

How-To-Repeat: Try to install 4.0-CURRENT-19991218
